{{CargoClone
|name=Fishing Master
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=133
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Quantum Amp production +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=When in Demon Form:
> Gain +1.5% Soul Chests in explorations
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=When in Demon Form:
> Gain +2.5% Soul Chests in explorations
|}}
